phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main entrance to the walled city is
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée principale de la ville close ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lahn-TRAY prahn-SEE-pal duh lah VEEL kloz
phrases.cultural_note: Porte Saint-Vincent is the main gate into Intra-Muros, on the southern side facing the harbor and ferry terminal.

responses.english: It's here, the Porte Saint-Vincent. You're here.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: C'est ici, la porte Saint-Vincent. Vous y êtes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist office is
phrases.cultural_note: The tourist office near Porte Saint-Vincent has maps, tide tables, and information on events.

responses.english: Just to the right after passing through the gate.
responses.phonetic: zhoost ah DRWAHT ahn pah-SAHN lah PORT
responses.local: Juste à droite en passant la porte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the market near the gate
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un marché près de cette porte ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un mar-SHAY preh duh set port
phrases.cultural_note: There's a small market square just inside the gate with local crafts and food products, especially during summer.

responses.english: Yes, just inside, especially in summer.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: Oui, juste à l'intérieur, surtout en été.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferries depart from
phrases.text_local: Où part le ferry pour les îles anglo-normandes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PAR luh feh-REE poor lay ZEEL ahn-glo-nor-MAHND
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries to the Channel Islands (Jersey, Guernsey) depart from the harbor just outside Porte Saint-Vincent. Tickets available at the terminal.

responses.english: From the terminal just outside the gate, port side.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: Du terminal juste à l'extérieur de la porte, côté port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the city walls walk from here
phrases.text_local: Par où commence la promenade sur les remparts ?
phrases.pronunciation: par oo koh-MONS lah pro-meh-NAD soor lay rahn-PAR
phrases.cultural_note: You can start the wall walk right from this gate — heading left follows the eastern ramparts toward Fort National and Grand Bé.

responses.english: Go left to walk along the eastern ramparts.
responses.local: Prenez à gauche pour longer les remparts est.
